brief_title: Pembrolizumab Monotherapy in PD-L1 High Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
official_title: A Phase 3, Randomized, Open-Label Study Comparing Pembrolizumab Monotherapy to Platinum-Based Chemotherapy in Treatment-Naive Patients with PD-L1 High (TPS >= 50%) Advanced Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
brief_summary: This Phase 3, randomized, open-label study compares the efficacy and safety of pembrolizumab monotherapy versus platinum-based chemotherapy as first-line treatment for advanced NSCLC with high PD-L1 expression (TPS >= 50%). The primary endpoint is progression-free survival.
raw_inclusion_text:
1. Adults aged 18 years or older

2. Histologically or cytologically confirmed stage IIIB/IIIC or stage IV non-small cell lung cancer

3. PD-L1 tumor proportion score (TPS) >= 50% by immunohistochemistry

4. No prior systemic therapy for advanced/metastatic NSCLC

5. ECOG Performance Status 0 or 1

6. At least one measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1

7. Adequate organ function including ANC >= 1500/μL, platelets >= 100,000/μL, hemoglobin >= 9 g/dL

8. eGFR >= 30 mL/min/1.73m²

9. Total bilirubin <= 1.5x upper limit of normal

10. AST and ALT <= 2.5x upper limit of normal (or <= 5x ULN if liver metastases)

11. Tumor tissue available for PD-L1 and biomarker analysis

12. Life expectancy >= 3 months

13. Written informed consent
raw_exclusion_text:
1. Known EGFR mutations or ALK rearrangements for which targeted therapy is indicated

2. Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression

3. Symptomatic or untreated brain metastases

4. Prior treatment with anti-PD-1, anti-PD-L1, or anti-CTLA-4 agents

5. Active interstitial lung disease or history of pneumonitis requiring steroids

6. Active or prior documented autoimmune or inflammatory disorder requiring systemic treatment within past 2 years

7. Live vaccine within 30 days of first dose

8. Concurrent systemic corticosteroids > 10mg/day prednisone equivalent

9. Known HIV, active Hepatitis B or C infection

inclusion_criteria.text: Histologically or cytologically confirmed stage IIIB/IIIC or stage IV non-small cell lung cancer
PD-L1 tumor proportion score (TPS) >= 50% by immunohistochemistry
No prior systemic therapy for advanced/metastatic NSCLC
At least one measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1

Total bilirubin <= 1.5x upper limit of normal
AST and ALT <= 2.5x upper limit of normal (or <= 5x ULN if liver metastases)
Tumor tissue available for PD-L1 and biomarker analysis

exclusion_criteria.text: Known EGFR mutations or ALK rearrangements for which targeted therapy is indicated
Active autoimmune disease requiring systemic immunosuppression
Prior treatment with anti-PD-1, anti-PD-L1, or anti-CTLA-4 agents
Active interstitial lung disease or history of pneumonitis requiring steroids
Active or prior documented autoimmune or inflammatory disorder requiring systemic treatment within past 2 years
Live vaccine within 30 days of first dose
Known HIV, active Hepatitis B or C infection
